expectations.text: Restates the problem before proposing anything
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Если я правильно понял, проблема в следующем...' — clear restatement

expectations.text: Asks at least one clarifying question before offering fixes
expectations.evidence: Asks 'это работало раньше, или это первый запуск после какого-то изменения?'

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a concrete fix/command in the first response
expectations.evidence: Lists possible causes as context but does not say 'try this' or give fix commands

expectations.text: Separates symptom from possible root causes
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'симптом (модуль не найден) и реальная причина (почему Node его не видит) — разные вещи'

expectations.text: Asks ONE question at a time (not a barrage of 3+)
expectations.evidence: One primary question about timing/change, plus one follow-up request for stack trace
